name: Bill Bryant
subject: Forge Long Term Plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forge Washington
body:
Dear Friends,
1. THE WHY:

**Do you want to stop the legislature from constantly passing new taxes and more taxes?**
**Do you want to stop seeing heroin legalized?**
**Would you like our parks to be safe and free of needles where everyone, including families, can gather and kids can play?**
We need a Republican majority in the legislature to do those things. We need to elect Republican candidates statewide. **To do that, we need a plan**. Not a one-year plan or a plan to help certain candidates. We need a four-year plan to create a majority.
**You want to see that plan? ****ForgeWA has it.**
ForgeWA's board recently approved a plan that will strategically focus efforts to elect Republicans to the legislature in 2022 and 2024 and Republicans to statewide offices in 2024.
**That plan starts now--in 2021.**
We can't keep getting jazzed up about a campaign in July of the election year and think that we are going to win. We can't keep focusing attention on one candidate and think that will deliver the change we need. We need a plan that builds from the ground up and that runs over many years. ForgeWA has that plan. We're ready to get it going. We need your help to fund the plan.
**Want to see the plan?**
2. THE HOW:

We can't reveal all the data and analysis in a letter like this, but I can show you a bit. Take a look:
* ForgeWA's plan is designed to gain 220,000 more Republican votes in 2024.

We do that and we start winning. BUT, if we are to recapture the legislature,
we need those new votes in specific swing legislative districts.
* How do we do that? In 2021, we build a foundation in those districts in preparation for races in 2022 and 2024.
* Where are those districts? Many of them are in Snohomish County, so that is where ForgeWA is starting in 2021.

In Snohomish County, every area that is yellow or orange is a swing area where we could earn votes. There are local races in all of these yellow areas this year and good candidates are running in those races. This year, ForgeWA will put all of its resources into certain races in swing areas of Snohomish County.

We will elect people who want to curb government's hunger for more taxes and who will help communities reclaim their neighborhoods and parks. **AND ...**
* **in 2021, we will lay the groundwork in these critical areas for legislative victories in 2022 and 2024;**
* **in 2022 , ForgeWA will let organizations that elect legislative candidates take the lead;**
* **in 2023 , ForgeWA will be back implementing a similar plan on the Eastside of King County and in parts of Pierce County. Also in 2023, ForgeWA will elect responsible people to local government positions, _and do it in a way that sets us up for victory_** _ ****in 2024****_

This is the type of long-term plan and coordination between different organizations that we have needed for a very long time, and ForgeWA is now delivering it.
________________________________________________________________
3. THE WHAT

What ForgeWA needs is the money to execute the plan. Not a huge amount, but it is critical we get it now. Time is running out in 2021. Doing what needs to be done in Snohomish in 2021, and doing what needs to be done to lay the groundwork for 2022 and 2024 requires a budget of $400,000 over the next 24 months.
**We need $230,000 now to get started. **
I am writing to ask you to be a part of this long term plan. ForgeWA has spent months examining where we win, where we lose, why we're losing, where we need to build a farm team of candidates and a solid foundation for future years. What we need is the money to execute that plan.
**Donors have often told me they won 't give any more until there is a long term plan for winning. Well, here is that plan. Together, let's implement it.**

I am asking you to please [donate $10, $25, $50 or $500 dollars to help Forge launch its 2021-2024 plan.](http://link.i-d-pro.com/ls/click?upn=v2C7K-2F4H-2FYNxcsZshOGQWLEPc9SuYM6ZPGOEW1L-2FHn9oAtrUl6p9EhWz690oW0aHFbpg2iHH2213uzyuxfrJRg-3D-3D3HA3_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymg5B2Xdj8Tkq4QqrzMvs0P4-2BpNnXzEyn9YSvC-2Bypir18SUvCQmdkaDv9zkw6pZ-2Bp7cy3gqmRcbmWYosT8DsysrglGdJnoFRF1cO6htjCHOq5i2GPMTr-2BQbL2zzo-2BX3uofA5uSxta3sHNxYpNISa2NeM2gx8NvBFtN-2BRPXPEe9IztvVLE80H0r4IsY5zNMTaV2gKOSC8v5ddJrH4ZUMwzeZirTGyheKQebjm3G9afiivQVXi2MZxRAcjOzNAVaIIuyA-3D) The money will help elect local candidates in key swing districts, recruit candidates to run in 2022 and 2024, and begin developing the voter contact lists and tools in those swing districts that we will need to win in 2022 and 2024.
**If we want to win in 2024, we need to start today**.
That is why I am asking you to please contribute to ForgeWA today. There are no legal limits on how much you may contribute.
[CLICK HERE TO DONATE](http://link.i-d-pro.com/ls/click?upn=v2C7K-2F4H-2FYNxcsZshOGQWCOEbYSOpKTfa9ZsP3OaJ8HLg6DL-2BxHKL5WdNgq5VG8DSUb4QzN55bc0D6QA-2FjLwv9MLcqXnJxIRFTUsuPBQiGg-3DBubz_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymg5B2Xdj8Tkq4QqrzMvs0P4-2BpNnXzEyn9YSvC-2Bypir18SUvCQmdkaDv9zkw6pZ-2Bp7cy3gqmRcbmWYosT8DsysrglGdJnoFRF1cO6htjCHOq5jOmBVSvu5SoKJejdBnhfmsnzFaXLXVyBj8Vn7SuBDOq0EjEyCjCjNqnMMPuvvnWBk-2B885TAYwqsS-2Fl9VdK8NBkHAct4e9ndls-2FN6JSpmnmd6TP-2BjgM7c6sTZ10jU-2BHL0WUsDzFwWhB4bwJzBjUlr4k-3D)
This is your chance to contribute to a data-based,
long-term plan to start winning in Washington again.
You have always supported me in the past. This time I'm not asking you to support my campaign, **I am asking you to** _support our campaign_. I am asking you to be a part of a multi-year effort to build Republican majorities in the State House and State Senate and help restore fiscal sanity to Olympia.
We know what needs to be done. Please join me today in doing it.
Thank you for contributing to our future.
Onward,

Bill

Paid for by Forge Washington
P.O. Box 1875
Tacoma, WA 98401
* When required by law some of ForgeWA's largest donors' names might appear on printed material. Please inquire if you have questions.

If you would like to unsubscribe and stop receiving these emails [ click here ](http://link.i-d-pro.com/wf/unsubscribe?upn=enNSH-2FxHAAqXgxiHRFihpX91d75ERAkpfg4XQfmYhCFOWvSmO7IJll-2Bjy9VO59G8IpH4E3nu9-2F5oHANpITihpRLitKU8gQ-2F3d0-2Biv5NPB8o08eZ-2FeZmPr2M9-2F7WMNwjyeT-2BfWaSmTZ8mtU1fD3NBhEqYcXNpV6-2F11e6H5Qs42Ft-2FdWm01WZGB4yROOglQN-2B7l1ibk9r458a3DzaPoMsRAnHQMHiEFCB-2F4o8JyLqe-2B4PYlGPBAguYuKD6VrtHr4tAbyyVyNWcDddCdEG3vJHPCG-2BsNeZdwdo9BfvE6to6-2FJ1ehddV-2FvQxGxb0zVUZSiCA)

name: Bo Snerdley
subject: Barkley Sees the Liberal Race Narrative
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NEW JOURNEY PAC
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166264:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "Tweet") Peter: I have always been a fan of Charles Barkley - not only for his skills on the court but also for his ability to say precisely what is on his mind. Barkley doesn't care what the media thinks about what he says, that's why he always tells the truth. **And this time he told a truth that the Democrats DON'T want you to know:_they LOVE racial division in America._** They have been using it for decades to stoke anger between White and Black America so they can stay in power. **[I started the New Journey PAC to counter the liberal narrative and Make Black America Conservative Again, and I need your help.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166264:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "I started the New Journey PAC to counter the liberal narrative and
Make Black America Conservative Again, and I need your help.")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166264:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "Rush")**My name is James Golden, but you may know me better as Bo Snerdley - the man behind the glass listening to the one and only Rush Limbaugh for more than 30 years.** Rush talked about it for years. Here is how the liberal race narrative goes:
* **To White America** : You are so racist; you don't even know that you are racist. We are the only ones who can save you from your racism. **Vote for us.**
* **To Black America** : All White people are racist, which is the reason for all of your problems. We are the only ones who can save you from America's racism. **Vote for us.**

It is all a lie, and they KNOW it is a lie. They KNOW that if White and Black America started working together, we will see through their lies. **This is their worst nightmare, and it is exactly what I am fighting for at the New Journey PAC. We are leading the fight to make Black America Conservative Again, and we are winning. Donald Trump received a record amount of the Black vote in 2016 and only increased that margin in 2020.** **[I founded the New Journey PAC to show the Black community the hypocrisy in our system and that a better way forward was possible if they stop believing the lies. Will you help me spread these truths and make a $45 donation today?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166265:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "I founded the New Journey PAC to show the Black community the
hypocrisy in our system and that a better way forward was possible if they stop believing the lies. Will you help me spread these truths and make a
$45 donation today?")** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166264:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "Riot")The liberal lies are tearing our nation apart - these are the same people who were CHEERING when American cities were burned during mass riots last summer. When they keep us fighting, we cannot fight what they are doing to our nation. I have had enough, and I can no longer sit back and watch them tear America apart with their lies. Charles Barkley was right - White America and black America need to build a New Journey. **That is why I am fighting,_and I need you to fight with us._** **[Please join us today with your gift of $45, $100 or even $1,000 and help us end the racial divide in American politics!](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166266:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "Please join us today with your gift of $45, $100 or even $1,000
and help us end the racial divide in American politics!")** For a New Journey, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57166264:JsEDTtu4N:m:1:3206719985:092FB764AC05CDEF666135BAA7416A93:r "James
Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley")
James Golden, AKA Bo Snerdley
Founder, New Journey PAC
---

NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE**

clean_body: The network admits to using propaganda to take down Matt Gaetz | | | | | | == | Peter, BREAKING: The Technical Director for CNN was captured on tape admitting that his network is using "propaganda" to take down Matt Gaetz. Project Veritas released a video featuring CNN Technical Director Charlie Chester talking about all the ways his network planned to remove President Trump from office and damage Matt Gaetz because "he's a problem for the Democratic Party..." == | == | | | == | This is a new low, even for the hacks at CNN. Knowingly using propaganda to take down political opponents truly makes them the enemy of the people. We must == before they are allowed to take down the rest of the America-First patriots who dare to stand up to their lies, smears, and propaganda. | | | == | We will be aggressively pursuing legal action against CNN and any mainstream media outlet that continues to spread lies about Matt Gaetz. That's why we need your support RIGHT NOW - are you ready to join us in the battle? | | | == | Thank you, Peter, for your continued support. We cannot win this fight without you! name: Team Cammack
subject: Kat Visited the Border…
body:
The truth is even worse than we thought
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlTvVKQvWBxAq0oglr0dNiNbxE4Nv5qSKK7RS1Vb76su-IOGddN3BenIC6j4EiljbavzBtof0bjZKtsGHcSebGy3t66INNaSO0Dve1NancbcC8Je8MsxRuydxsw5Li8y70YRBpTdnEv1e4NwZZ91BPaADWT6h8luiQ8H2oxJ9pbM-4xBWPRlvq0H7mf7oJfa&c=WtUvMSkcQ4sPzzrQ8Q9LtyO4IrzuKCGEqF1IigbwOpQ6IwvGzSoEcg==&ch=DG3HSAzg48q27QMfMaWRBUCeLLQXbVEpLnqGWgb8SdQ3RJTpuBEHdw==&jrc=1)
---
| Patriot,
Kat recently visited our Southern Border and what she saw was a full blown humanitarian crisis. Later that week, she went on Fox to talk about the horrors she had seen.
She discussed the heartbreaking stories of migrant children, the horrendous conditions in facilities, and the appalling harassment of our Border Patrol agents by the cartels.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlTvVKQvWBxAq0oglr0dNiNbxE4Nv5qSKK7RS1Vb76su-IOGddN3BenIC6j4EiljbavzBtof0bjZKtsGHcSebGy3t66INNaSO0Dve1NancbcC8Je8MsxRuydxsw5Li8y70YRBpTdnEv1e4NwZZ91BPaADWT6h8luiQ8H2oxJ9pbM-4xBWPRlvq0H7mf7oJfa&c=WtUvMSkcQ4sPzzrQ8Q9LtyO4IrzuKCGEqF1IigbwOpQ6IwvGzSoEcg==&ch=DG3HSAzg48q27QMfMaWRBUCeLLQXbVEpLnqGWgb8SdQ3RJTpuBEHdw==&jrc=1)
---
| | | [WATCH THE FULL INTERVIEW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlTvVKQvWBxAq0oglr0dNiNbxE4Nv5qSKK7RS1Vb76su-IOGddN3BenIC6j4EiljbavzBtof0bjZKtsGHcSebGy3t66INNaSO0Dve1NancbcC8Je8MsxRuydxsw5Li8y70YRBpTdnEv1e4NwZZ91BPaADWT6h8luiQ8H2oxJ9pbM-4xBWPRlvq0H7mf7oJfa&c=WtUvMSkcQ4sPzzrQ8Q9LtyO4IrzuKCGEqF1IigbwOpQ6IwvGzSoEcg==&ch=DG3HSAzg48q27QMfMaWRBUCeLLQXbVEpLnqGWgb8SdQ3RJTpuBEHdw==&jrc=1)
---
| We cannot stand by as the Biden Administration continues to allow this border crisis to continue. There are thousands of children suffering on our Southern Border because President Biden is not enforcing our immigration laws and continues to tear down policies that have been proven to work.
Not only are these children suffering the consequences of Biden's actions, the safety of the American people has also been put in jeopardy. Dangerous cartel members are crossing our borders and laughing because "there is nothing we can do about it."
Kat will not stand by and watch how our border patrols and our country are mocked. She has seen first hand what the tragedy at our border looks like, and is determined to do something to stop this senseless humanitarian crisis. [Can Kat count on your support to stop the Biden Administration's mismanagement of our border security?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlTvVKQvWBxAq0oglr0dNiNbxE4Nv5qSKK7RS1Vb76su-IOGddN3BenIC6j4EiljbavzBtof0bjZKtsGHcSebGy3t66INNaSO0Dve1NancbcC8Je8MsxRuydxsw5Li8y70YRBpTdnEv1e4NwZZ91BPaADWT6h8luiQ8H2oxJ9pbM-4xBWPRlvq0H7mf7oJfa&c=WtUvMSkcQ4sPzzrQ8Q9LtyO4IrzuKCGEqF1IigbwOpQ6IwvGzSoEcg==&ch=DG3HSAzg48q27QMfMaWRBUCeLLQXbVEpLnqGWgb8SdQ3RJTpuBEHdw==&jrc=1)
---
| | | [DONATE HERE TO HELP KAT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001YlTvVKQvWBxAq0oglr0dNiNbxE4Nv5qSKK7RS1Vb76su-IOGddN3BenIC6j4EiljbavzBtof0bjZKtsGHcSebGy3t66INNaSO0Dve1NancbcC8Je8MsxRuydxsw5Li8y70YRBpTdnEv1e4NwZZ91BPaADWT6h8luiQ8H2oxJ9pbM-4xBWPRlvq0H7mf7oJfa&c=WtUvMSkcQ4sPzzrQ8Q9LtyO4IrzuKCGEqF1IigbwOpQ6IwvGzSoEcg==&ch=DG3HSAzg48q27QMfMaWRBUCeLLQXbVEpLnqGWgb8SdQ3RJTpuBEHdw==&jrc=1)

clean_body: The truth is even worse than we thought | | | | | | | Patriot, Kat recently visited our Southern Border and what she saw was a full blown humanitarian crisis. Later that week, she went on Fox to talk about the horrors she had seen. She discussed the heartbreaking stories of migrant children, the horrendous conditions in facilities, and the appalling harassment of our Border Patrol agents by the cartels. | | | | | We cannot stand by as the Biden Administration continues to allow this border crisis to continue. There are thousands of children suffering on our Southern Border because President Biden is not enforcing our immigration laws and continues to tear down policies that have been proven to work. Not only are these children suffering the consequences of Biden's actions, the safety of the American people has also been put in jeopardy. Dangerous cartel members are crossing our borders and laughing because "there is nothing we can do about it." Kat will not stand by and watch how our border patrols and our country are mocked. She has seen first hand what the tragedy at our border looks like, and is determined to do something to stop this senseless humanitarian crisis. | | | | Thank you! For America, Team Cammack | | | | | | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

What is the Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC)?
The Republican State Leadership Committee (RSLC) isn't just another alphabet soup political committee. We're the largest caucus of Republican state leaders in the nation with one unified goal: winning. Through innovative strategies and record-breaking support across all 50 states, we recruit, train, and support Republicans to state offices. Following a historically successful 2020 election cycle, state Republicans currently hold 62 of 99 state legislative chambers, 25 of 45 lieutenant governor seats, 28 of 50 secretary of state offices, and 11 of 12 independently-elected agriculture officials -- thanks in large part to the support from patriots like you. name: Bob Fertik - Democrats.com
subject: Fire DeJoy
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1).
| [](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18635)
---
|
# **Sign the Petition: Fire Postmaster General Louis DeJoy**
# **[](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18636)**
Last year, then-President Trump's handpicked Postmaster General Louis DeJoy repeatedly made headlines for his efforts to sabotage the Postal Service. He imposed outrageous restrictions on postal workers, removed mailboxes by the truckload, and more. And though many of these dangerous directives were reversed by courts, thanks to lawsuits from voting rights groups -- we now know that hamstringing the USPS was a key part of Trump's plan to undermine vote-by-mail in the 2020 election. Trump even admitted it -- when he said he was against funding the USPS because "they need that money in order to make the Post Office work so it can take all of these millions and millions of ballots." [[1]](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18637) But even though Trump is no longer president, the threat that he and DeJoy pose to our Postal Service remains. In fact, DeJoy just unveiled a 10-year plan for the USPS that would further slow down first-class mail delivery, reduce Post Office hours, and raise postage prices. [[2]](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18638) That's outrageous -- Americans nationwide are still counting on the Postal Service to safely deliver their paychecks, life-saving medications, letters from their loved ones, and more. But unless we take action, DeJoy will remain Postmaster General for -- in his words -- "a long time," [[3]](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18639) calling the shots for the very agency he has tried to destroy. On March 15th, President Biden officially nominated three new members to the USPS Board of Governors, which is the only body that has the power to fire DeJoy. They are currently awaiting Senate confirmation. Every day that DeJoy remains in charge, our USPS is in jeopardy. That's why the Senate must swiftly give up or down votes for Biden's nominees to the Board of Governors -- and why the Board must fire DeJoy when they take office. If you agree, add your name today. _This petition is sponsored by: Americans for Tax Fairness Action Fund, Broward for Progress, California Clean Money Action Fund, Coalition On Human Needs, Common Cause, Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington, Daily Kos, Demand Progress, DemCastUSA, Democrats.com, Hip Hop Caucus, The Juggernaut Project, Other98, Progress America, Progressive Caucus Action Fund, Progressive Reform Network, United We Dream_
* * *
1) [https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/2020/08/12/postal-service-ballots-dejoy/](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18637)
2) [https://www.washingtonpost.com/business/2021/03/22/usps-dejoy-plan/](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18638)
3) [https://www.cnn.com/2021/02/24/politics/usps-board-of-governors-joe-biden-nominees/index.html](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18639) [ADD YOUR NAME](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18636) . We really appreciate your participation in this petition, as we expand our efforts to**identify every Democratic voter in the US to make sure they vote for Democrats in every election.** If you'd like to help us organize, [please join our Facebook community](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18630). Thanks for all you do! | ****| **Bob Fertik, President**
---|---
_Democrats.com is the oldest online community of progressive activists, with over 7 million supporters. We fight for jobs, justice, healthcare, education, the environment, and peace. We're supported by great progressive partners so we never ask for donations. Please join us at_ _[Democrats.com](http://votedem.org/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100165806.546336.425&gen=1&mailing_linkid=18631)_ _!_

PO Box 1452
New York, NY 10276

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Going after corrupt politicians
body:
Judicial Watch continues to be very effective in our mission of standing firm for the rule of the law and going after corrupt politicians.

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

I'll be short and direct....
...Judicial Watch _continues to be very effective_ in our mission of standing firm for the rule of the law and going after corrupt politicians.
And with your **_[generous support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53423&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTQxNDEwNTM=)_** , I promise to continue to fight hard on issues you care most about like the following:
* Our Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) document requests and looming lawsuits to learn whether Biden executive orders to dismantle Trump immigration regulations and open our borders (which have directly resulted in an unprecedented new crisis of illegal aliens, including "unaccompanied minors" flooding over the Mexican border), exceeded the president's constitutional authority and creating a huge health and humanitarian crisis.
* Our highly successful mission to keep elections honest and help reduce the incidence of voter fraud by compelling states to comply with federal law to take reasonable steps to keep their voting rolls accurate. We are currently suing Colorado, Illinois, North Carolina and Pennsylvania following successful lawsuits in several other states.

* Our ongoing FOIA document requests and litigation to get to all the facts about Biden family influence-peddling schemes that span from Ukraine to China.

* _Our historic lawsuit continues against the city of San Francisco and Santa Clara County, California, over their deadly "sanctuary" policies_. They take on critical "precedential" importance today as liberal mayors and governors now operate more than 500 sanctuary counties, cities and states across America; and the Biden administration attempts to gut our laws against illegal immigration.

As far as I'm concerned, _we can 't ever do enough_ to fight for the rule of law and honest and open government. When it comes to using the courts to support the rule of law and government transparency, Judicial Watch is still the "only game in town."
That's why your **_[best donation today](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53423&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTQxNDEwNTM=)_** is so important.
Personally, I can't think of a time in our twenty-seven-year history that a strong Judicial Watch has been more important to our nation. I am extremely grateful for your **_[generous support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53423&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTQxNDEwNTM=)_** of our mission.
Sincerely,
Tom Fitton President
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53423&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTQxNDEwNTM=)

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
Bill Lee, Marsha Blackburn, Bill Hagerty – they’re all the same. They are Trump’s legacy and will continue to push his hateful ideology and dangerous agenda as long as they remain in power. That’s why the TNDP is laser focused right now on our Build Back Blue program, and why we need help reaching our mid-month goal. We still have $4,790 to raise before midnight tomorrow. Will you help? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
The TNDP has been long overdue for an overhaul, and that’s exactly what we’re doing now. On April 22, our Build Back Blue Kickoff event will mark a turning point in our efforts towards defeating Bill Lee and his co-conspirators. In addition to speakers from across the state, musical performances, branding reveal, and a question and answer session with TNDP staff, we will be premiering new digital ads, and new merchandise. The TNDP is ready to turn Tennessee Blue, we just need help covering costs.
Will you make a donation of $25, or whatever you can afford, and help us close the gap before midnight tomorrow? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus

Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party

name: Team Field - Fair Fight Action
subject: Democracy Warrior Next Steps
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
-------
Thank you so much for signing up to volunteer with Fair Fight Action! Whether you have volunteered with us since the beginning, been here just a few weeks, or signed up but haven’t had a chance to volunteer yet, we are so happy to have you. This email is long but has a lot of good and necessary information so please read all the way through, even if you have been volunteering with us for a long time!

What Fair Fight Action does & will continue to do in 2021: Fair Fight Action is a voting rights organization that fights voter suppression, engages voters to educate and empower them, and advocates for pro-voting policies in Georgia and at a national level. This work takes many forms - our main focuses are on litigation, legislation, and direct advocacy. Volunteers are crucial to this work!

Fair Fight Action educates voters about elections, making their voting plan, and more. You might have come to Fair Fight Action through our voter turnout and electoral work, which is just one of our goals! It contributes to our organization’s goal of ensuring that all voters’ rights are protected, that they have the resources and support that they need, and that they are able to have their voices heard.

We combat voter suppression through advocacy, legislation, and litigation. This means taking action to educate voters about how to participate in elections, empowering them to tell their stories, supporting pro-voting measures and opposing harmful legislation, and litigating when applicable to stand up for voters and ensure their voices and votes are protected. We have to use every tool at our disposal to make sure voters are able to have their voices heard at the ballot box.

Fair Fight Action is actively engaged in coalition work with many organizations who share our mission. This work includes direct voter contact, supporting state-level campaigns and voter protection programs, and building national support for federal legislation like HR 1 (For The People Act) and HR 4 (the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act), that would go a long way towards federal protections for voting rights.

Not sure what volunteering with Fair Fight Action might entail? Here are just a few of the things our wonderful volunteers do:

clean_body: Thank you so much for signing up to volunteer with Fair Fight Action! Whether you have volunteered with us since the beginning, been here just a few weeks, or signed up but haven’t had a chance to volunteer yet, we are so happy to have you. This email is long but has a lot of good and necessary information so please read all the way through, even if you have been volunteering with us for a long time! What Fair Fight Action does & will continue to do in 2021: Fair Fight Action is a voting rights organization that fights voter suppression, engages voters to educate and empower them, and advocates for pro-voting policies in Georgia and at a national level. This work takes many forms - our main focuses are on litigation, legislation, and direct advocacy. Volunteers are crucial to this work! Fair Fight Action educates voters about elections, making their voting plan, and more. You might have come to Fair Fight Action through our voter turnout and electoral work, which is just one of our goals! It contributes to our organization’s goal of ensuring that all voters’ rights are protected, that they have the resources and support that they need, and that they are able to have their voices heard. We combat voter suppression through advocacy, legislation, and litigation. This means taking action to educate voters about how to participate in elections, empowering them to tell their stories, supporting pro-voting measures and opposing harmful legislation, and litigating when applicable to stand up for voters and ensure their voices and votes are protected. We have to use every tool at our disposal to make sure voters are able to have their voices heard at the ballot box. Fair Fight Action is actively engaged in coalition work with many organizations who share our mission. This work includes direct voter contact, supporting state-level campaigns and voter protection programs, and building national support for federal legislation like HR 1 (For The People Act) and HR 4 (the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act), that would go a long way towards federal protections for voting rights. Not sure what volunteering with Fair Fight Action might entail? Here are just a few of the things our wonderful volunteers do: Phonebanking & texting Georgia voters: to educate them on current voter suppression efforts & bills going through the GA General Assembly, recruit them to volunteer with Fair Fight Action, ask them to attend local board meetings or hearings to make their voices heard and provide resources & information about upcoming elections (NOT about specific candidates). Help listen to, write and review voters’ stories. If you’re in Georgia: attend local Election Board meetings, submit written or live testimony on how legislation would affect you & your community, contact your elected officials, serving as a volunteer outside poll observer and more. Assisting in researching local voting regulations. Contact your State and Congressional Representatives about state and Federal voting rights legislation. Supporting other volunteers as they phone or text bank; for example: serving as a volunteer Slack moderator Live outside Georgia and looking to get involved with a voter protection organization in your state? Here are a few of the organizations doing this work in some of our partner states [] . What’s next as a volunteer with Fair Fight Action: Keep an eye on your email - we will send out email updates on our work and with action items. Check out [] to stay up to date with action items on voting rights no matter where you call home. Please check back often as new actions can develop in different states quickly! Sign up for the Democracy Warrior Summit - it will be a chance to do a deeper dive on specific information on voter suppression mitigation work as well as training on specific skills and tools including Slack, our new texting platform, etc. Georgia residents sign up HERE [] (Sat. 3/20 11am-3pm ET) If you live outside of Georgia sign up HERE [] (Sun. 3/21 5pm-8pm ET/2pm-5pm PST) Please only sign up for ONE of these Summits, and we ask that only people who live in Georgia sign up for the Georgia Democracy Warrior Summit as it will have specifics for people currently in the state. If you want to continue volunteering with Fair Fight Action PLEASE sign up to attend the appropriate Summit so you can get all the necessary information & training. This will also be a great opportunity to meet other volunteers. Have friends who are eager & ready to volunteer with Fair Fight Action? Invite them to the Democracy Warriors Summit! Georgia residents sign up HERE [] (Sat. 3/20 11am-3pm ET) If you live outside of Georgia sign up HERE [] (Sun. 3/21 5pm-8pm ET/2pm-5pm PST) Want to make sure you’re getting updates from Fair Fight Action? Friend, you cannot make this stuff up! It is now clear that President Biden and Vice President Harris are not taking this crisis seriously. Sending cash payments to these countries will only make the crisis worse and incentivize more people to come to America.

[**We must _immediately_ restart construction on the border wall.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001JpebC6kY8sXdX7m88Q86QkpoNZiNYZb4167jlNQ3eV-nJT6zJk2pypYbuVHef5Mlb0wSSDQDUk4HifiL3Q1tUNjJKF5cSapofIOrYJwK1qJGTsK6ocHo5xfM6ZY2k7iKgii8s2mTfX-_Qhrrz8dczBbxhtO5QdK3n1YJvbVHYylx8oxMnLPKi60eQCZyiCA5IjMtI0JAxCcASa2iy8GBSEbggXtlCaBUbhTI3qCIC_ZRMRGVBcyYH-HH7OH4OE6XA1PEZjt4Uw5ckPrCeGcuqv4UniSYbJ5VsifLZvntm5q60FlCZfHiKMY97Zm0SRkNeg6bHMhBMhZm90ws4zGGrnFuaYKImU9NmLdxMjmyEsH3pdSVzN_482KQ_4hf9GnxZFJTlztr4idFHRFusvdzMw==&c=Nt7w6pdlaXnpKEyPpcwwuya3nojp4jD4ImxlsW4XM1U1jxM-nCZY_g==&ch=TZYDxB3J-v3RyScADsxbeDBsbnryWWmdL5Mzyb6DKzKma3AxPH-whw==) The administration is doing everything but trying to solve this crisis.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Why I support President Biden's American Jobs Plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
It's a promising blueprint for America's economic and climate recovery.

| [](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/XXv0hXagbbCN/YmRSWmZZZkZiMDg3UEFuWS9SaVdFZWF6bU1RUlRZWEV1ek5MMWtzanNGY0FHeUpsZEIzbVBtc0loaVRPNGhIVHdGZ3ZEMWI3V2p3QkdwaE4va0VhUFVDMFlja3JBTEc0VXB4d0M5c3czRGc9S0/WFRaY3NEcDBYeG9LUzVwZllIcWhFQ3dTVXdFbCtwbmhCTk1iTXg5VVhGVT0S1) Friend, For years, we've been working to enact a bold climate agenda in Washington state, implementing aggressive emissions-reduction goals, making historic investments in green transportation, and rapidly expanding our state's solar energy production. But Washington is just one state, and we can't end the climate crisis alone. As I've long said, tackling the climate crisis with the speed and scale it demands is going to require a whole-of-government approach -- and soon. That's why I applaud President Biden's recent rollout of the American Jobs Plan. By putting forth a federal clean electricity standard, a Civilian Climate Corps, and unprecedented investments in clean infrastructure, the American Jobs Plan is a promising blueprint for America's economic _and_ climate recovery. [**Will you add your name today, alongside mine, to show your support for the American Jobs Plan?**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJVaRLLBY/YmRSWmZZZkZiMDg3UEFuWS9SaVdFZWF6bU1RUlRZWEV1ek5MMWtzanNGY0FHeUpsZEIzbVBtc0loaVRPNGhIVHdGZ3ZEMWI3V2p3QkdwaE4va0VhUFVDMFlja3JBTEc0VXB4d0M5c3czRGc9S0/WFRaY3NEcDBYeG9LUzVwZllIcWhFQ3dTVXdFbCtwbmhCTk1iTXg5VVhGVT0S1) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/GRW2C3-rxxcV/YmRSWmZZZkZiMDg3UEFuWS9SaVdFZWF6bU1RUlRZWEV1ek5MMWtzanNGY0FHeUpsZEIzbVBtc0loaVRPNGhIVHdGZ3ZEMWI3V2p3QkdwaE4va0VhUFVDMFlja3JBTEc0VXB4d0M5c3czRGc9S0/WFRaY3NEcDBYeG9LUzVwZllIcWhFQ3dTVXdFbCtwbmhCTk1iTXg5VVhGVT0S1)
---
The American Jobs Plan is a once-in-a-generation investment in America, as President Biden said. We can't afford to leave anyone behind, including the Black, Latino, Asian American, Native American, rural, and other communities that are hit first and worst and have been sidelined for too long.
I sincerely hope Congress will move quickly to turn the American Jobs Plan into a reality, as we continue to do the same with our own climate agenda here in Washington. [**Sign on today if you support making this once-in-a-generation investment in our shared future.**](https://links.e.jayinslee.com/els/v2/erqjJVaRLLBY/YmRSWmZZZkZiMDg3UEFuWS9SaVdFZWF6bU1RUlRZWEV1ek5MMWtzanNGY0FHeUpsZEIzbVBtc0loaVRPNGhIVHdGZ3ZEMWI3V2p3QkdwaE4va0VhUFVDMFlja3JBTEc0VXB4d0M5c3czRGc9S0/WFRaY3NEcDBYeG9LUzVwZllIcWhFQ3dTVXdFbCtwbmhCTk1iTXg5VVhGVT0S1)
Very truly yours,
Jay

***ALERT: Squad Member wants to ABOLISH Police & CLOSE Prisons **
Friend,
Did you see the "SQUAD" member Congresswoman Rashida Tlaib just called for ABOLISHING the Police and doing away with prisons all across America! She even said that "policing in our country is inherently and intentionally racist" and that "it can't be reformed."
_**At a time when members of Congress sit comfortably behind fortified walls defended by US Capitol Police and the Army National Guard, it is beyond ironic that some are calling to end basic police protection for American families.**_
[**Want to ABOLISH the POLICE? >>> Take our Poll **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vr4qZipvMb52PFAt8nD9eq7OL08O-Cjl87MTy7XoE0HLOhevVwnwZOtEW806PZJ8eI_egA3VSKDtawz58BAQZvBCt-yeZ1BTKHbiPlGagivzxV69g0tGzqglVpnjBIm-jvVgpr467Itwl3KPQEy_Tdziq9zY9tIF5rWevL6sDU9WiTfugXCTJzqeFC0OHOQMnS-8bHSkaCVmYQyp17b2yh5x0CU-1RE8ZgYjqy6QD6uLkc5N3CGnctQjgUxtP_eHNI8VEGh8nC1PB8_XgkgbXu8adN_17afIeoDoPPHgdgirxGkA-bMsopRXtxyVJvvnEXR75JWMWhhZ38qSRdD0LPYKYuj2LH9LtlGo8t4eDU1X2_djjkdiFsTYRNB9fI9jOUj5QXA5nq-cKv-NOPpicbAbVYWBKoTmQDZRAgji5f44Q-_8Q9AT6WbDunVkwuvgM0KOCjoOPYEjzW5UpN3BRQ==&c=ECRSS5Pp0izsiYrLY7yZiRCmobvh5IPlqKUzdNvs5ruaxF38ZVCxZQ==&ch=my5wcMBWeiR_rJgYVBI11rXBtV1rg4vlL0WVCxAn6un0947yJXHo8A==)
Congresswoman Tlaib is known for gaslighting situations and spreading lies, but her recent comments are way out in the political stratosphere.
Putting violent felons back on the street without Police would turn America into a lawless nation.
[**Want to CLOSE Prisons? >>> Take our Poll **](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vr4qZipvMb52PFAt8nD9eq7OL08O-Cjl87MTy7XoE0HLOhevVwnwZOtEW806PZJ8eI_egA3VSKDtawz58BAQZvBCt-yeZ1BTKHbiPlGagivzxV69g0tGzqglVpnjBIm-jvVgpr467Itwl3KPQEy_Tdziq9zY9tIF5rWevL6sDU9WiTfugXCTJzqeFC0OHOQMnS-8bHSkaCVmYQyp17b2yh5x0CU-1RE8ZgYjqy6QD6uLkc5N3CGnctQjgUxtP_eHNI8VEGh8nC1PB8_XgkgbXu8adN_17afIeoDoPPHgdgirxGkA-bMsopRXtxyVJvvnEXR75JWMWhhZ38qSRdD0LPYKYuj2LH9LtlGo8t4eDU1X2_djjkdiFsTYRNB9fI9jOUj5QXA5nq-cKv-NOPpicbAbVYWBKoTmQDZRAgji5f44Q-_8Q9AT6WbDunVkwuvgM0KOCjoOPYEjzW5UpN3BRQ==&c=ECRSS5Pp0izsiYrLY7yZiRCmobvh5IPlqKUzdNvs5ruaxF38ZVCxZQ==&ch=my5wcMBWeiR_rJgYVBI11rXBtV1rg4vlL0WVCxAn6un0947yJXHo8A==)
Our brave men and women in Blue are patriotic Americans like you and me. They put their lives on the line every day to defend our nation and protect our communities.
I'm proud to Back the Blue and I'll never apologize for standing with Law Enforcement.
Thank you,
Congressman Jeff Van Drew

At a time when members of Congress sit comfortably behind fortified walls defended by US Capitol Police and the Army National Guard, it is beyond ironic that some are calling to end basic police protection for American families. == Congresswoman Tlaib is known for gaslighting situations and spreading lies, but her recent comments are way out in the political stratosphere. Putting violent felons back on the street without Police would turn America into a lawless nation. == Our brave men and women in Blue are patriotic Americans like you and me. They put their lives on the line every day to defend our nation and protect our communities. I'm proud to Back the Blue and I'll never apologize for standing with Law Enforcement. Thank you, Congressman Jeff Van Drew ** Would you like to stay in touch with Team VanDrew? Follow us on == == Paid for by Van Drew for Congress. name: Jim Jordan
subject: Will you vote in our Trump Poll today?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78c77b64a7a040dcaa697b5ef8999d7a&_e=wrvYiErBui__OLrHZciYz-MpEW6KuhhWaimPRWJOVCWdCtrFsuhsAzDXYtzA4OlXeW9TEjsfhal23ew8c77KWb8fiTo03dbkT0EPzGgoN7fbUr0vxdMWeuJjPRWZ7i61fhgxtn8xBGDnf5o3OFjnbAs1o_hdTYn2YBMpKx5ehg7sNnKjRwJ_KY_n-uL55vPuUsbBjmNLoMxiJpYjnKLobn8u7DT3bd8PW6KYk0WUtv36nGJpIiT083jZR1sYM-_k0RxHf1-BJg1dzdw8glngU0RxvLGHMQhKlswhAE-CDv8YCF8uaojx2T5zxSN1YZGyq3s9rpgSdmeRQsGDAKbNzoaYPygvbP1-RLZnOY94GiVHgQR5MJMlp_L_hQU3aOzI875B1ELNPP1gLt6K2OwSzLiq9Vo-QC_2BdC6jDkzqFAww22OOcz0QcmCqnt238o5z86fXzRbriqIiiA6cEUQK_km1wbgnmbxLbEnl97-JGsrWpw3muIy5MGSpc3V8hT1)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we’re not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we’re coming up 1,000 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78c77b64a7a040dcaa697b5ef8999d7a&_e=wrvYiErBui__OLrHZciYz-MpEW6KuhhWaimPRWJOVCWdCtrFsuhsAzDXYtzA4OlXeW9TEjsfhal23ew8c77KWb8fiTo03dbkT0EPzGgoN7fbUr0vxdMWeuJjPRWZ7i61fhgxtn8xBGDnf5o3OFjnbAs1o_hdTYn2YBMpKx5ehg7sNnKjRwJ_KY_n-uL55vPuUsbBjmNLoMxiJpYjnKLobn8u7DT3bd8PW6KYk0WUtv36nGJpIiT083jZR1sYM-_k0RxHf1-BJg1dzdw8glngU6Wq1JR4Q8N1x8Uj7k7uBmTF9aJQrtbGN8-qT8ZozoQdN0AhZ3odRfYKjY_t98IxFfMp62YrmNsTljCt2I7k_wsOABcal7Rtw9PJ0ev9WZkWIfn6exZVo4RgtLJ3Cm_k8XBs1hS8vXuhRDqPPVQ2OJmY0MdyrMPKYZe4swu-k3_Nd3KgFyPjz-SwmkUaZdhY2-M5k-z2x8sEz_IJ63_9b8fBcHyXTbDP28GKdZIHK5Ck)**

[ ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78c77b64a7a040dcaa697b5ef8999d7a&_e=wrvYiErBui__OLrHZciYz-MpEW6KuhhWaimPRWJOVCWdCtrFsuhsAzDXYtzA4OlXeW9TEjsfhal23ew8c77KWb8fiTo03dbkT0EPzGgoN7fbUr0vxdMWeuJjPRWZ7i61fhgxtn8xBGDnf5o3OFjnbAs1o_hdTYn2YBMpKx5ehg7sNnKjRwJ_KY_n-uL55vPuUsbBjmNLoMxiJpYjnKLobn8u7DT3bd8PW6KYk0WUtv36nGJpIiT083jZR1sYM-_k0RxHf1-BJg1dzdw8glngUy99vZ_XMQi_W-VuFVA18Ajas0moNzXPwU_TNw7-loENrqK3KbmEtXv0Z03de8BaldtO9yznrN2M1c59aKVDBoTbhXBpnNE3dIBlDU9mCCbA-s5PLgUUJTMFXtocqOjwVah4QzW5JACfYnW61_ElcA8rOV_d3I37qsaxt6MlSg2gFRfgH9QwUzWoN7UChpIQqAuFIE5F5KdMcBbR6MG_W8JymBrEWd6XcZyN2NqtSXZX)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go – and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year’s midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78c77b64a7a040dcaa697b5ef8999d7a&_e=wrvYiErBui__OLrHZciYz-MpEW6KuhhWaimPRWJOVCWdCtrFsuhsAzDXYtzA4OlXeW9TEjsfhal23ew8c77KWb8fiTo03dbkT0EPzGgoN7fbUr0vxdMWeuJjPRWZ7i61fhgxtn8xBGDnf5o3OFjnbAs1o_hdTYn2YBMpKx5ehg7sNnKjRwJ_KY_n-uL55vPuUsbBjmNLoMxiJpYjnKLobn8u7DT3bd8PW6KYk0WUtv36nGJpIiT083jZR1sYM-_k0RxHf1-BJg1dzdw8glngU8y5TWtugRMpm7iwhw3qTEJx3WDeFl18GnOHiaDl3UV63LwH4Hdpk76vmbab9Mh8VXszusJNYoWX5VZJ5J4xHnDpRnAR9lCGv9zNUT5neRFeOGdqaDRBDny1PMPyMYswKHh79G-J0BXEtyS-QD9Ij6UTca0xNLirr2qzpzOoqiQFAbXH5fsHfJwtc7lhAnCD8kEdTj2zLIHajy0OmvyDwFK4dT7QzDnvT70WT9gz6eg3)**

We need to know whether or not you’re going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78c77b64a7a040dcaa697b5ef8999d7a&_e=wrvYiErBui__OLrHZciYz-MpEW6KuhhWaimPRWJOVCWdCtrFsuhsAzDXYtzA4OlXeW9TEjsfhal23ew8c77KWb8fiTo03dbkT0EPzGgoN7fbUr0vxdMWeuJjPRWZ7i61fhgxtn8xBGDnf5o3OFjnbAs1o_hdTYn2YBMpKx5ehg7sNnKjRwJ_KY_n-uL55vPuUsbBjmNLoMxiJpYjnKLobn8u7DT3bd8PW6KYk0WUtv36nGJpIiT083jZR1sYM-_k0RxHf1-BJg1dzdw8glngUyldWEr452kUOGu-T3hSJPvx9pKp4o0boLUVlzZzvTe7hMmEcB6YlNVXq1GAW6Ru4A2f_gHH_NltcL9gf9wRypocVU2VdegTqeTmSZUnoOS_oZBGNmxDqSbzLWWUKoOE4E8TXf-4Zirw7AOUkZcQtQKn79ijg73Q_bqsvQUpqHXYYbFFry4mmDldGk6nmYUQfTTZlooy7n8Ppyk3nlTnULTIe7PRIZny04iNe4HNmXN_)
---

For freedom,
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=78c77b64a7a040dcaa697b5ef8999d7a&_e=wrvYiErBui__OLrHZciYz-MpEW6KuhhWaimPRWJOVCWdCtrFsuhsAzDXYtzA4OlXeW9TEjsfhal23ew8c77KWb8fiTo03dbkT0EPzGgoN7fbUr0vxdMWeuJjPRWZ7i61fhgxtn8xBGDnf5o3OFjnbAs1o_hdTYn2YBMpKx5ehg7sNnKjRwJ_KY_n-uL55vPuUsbBjmNLoMxiJpYjnKLobn8u7DT3bd8PW6KYk0WUtv36nGJpIiT083jZR1sYM-_k0RxHf1-BJg1dzdw8glngU2OapuSrWV-a4qzi4WzHatnvWsgd3j_gS-YmTfH4scrDE7kDQ3LEZ6z7BaVJCBcRfY7z0YxYfrhg1_k1Ck40GMjdfPNh9zGPQ3R4XnYlMbQMD5DpSyD7J8XIemh4HPjvML3WWYcOCZhHEOqCapw9YfpEbKNW-Obkvsqf9kWypuVGQdyTbK0T8b5oxgT2xj5MmwgKAeT5lCbAltuA5q-K9FKeHZsbu6q3Dj_SnFcJrEej)

body:
We're getting inundated with emails and messages from Trump supporters and Republicans from across the country who are so excited--but we haven't heard from YOU!

Democrats have built a campaign war chest filled with MILLIONS going into this next election cycle. We need to make sure our Conservative candidates have the resources to fight back and win! If we miss this goal, we risk being outraised and outspent AGAIN.

subject: The crisis at the border has gotten worse...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
The Democrats’ silence over the crisis at our southern border is deafening.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470390?e=1acd9bb3d6)
https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-041421?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Border_041421&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=1ac2c17df7&mc_eid=UNIQID

Hoosier Republican,

What’s been happening at our border over the last month is truly alarming.

Thanks to Biden’s “turnstile borders” campaign promises, the massive wave of immigrants illegally crossing our border has reached a critical mass.

It’s utter chaos. Teachers are being sent in to teach children in-person, when their home classrooms are still on virtual learning plans. The number of children sent to the border grows by the day. And the logistical problems of reuniting them with their families back home isn’t getting any smaller.

Our law enforcement and Border Patrol agents are overwhelmed and overworked, and the wave of people does not stop.

Not a single Democrat heeded President Trump’s warning that this is EXACTLY what would happen when you tell everyone that they’re going to get a free pass into the country and amnesty.

The Democrats will try and tell you that this “isn’t a crisis.” That our country has more pressing issues – just months after slamming President Trump for his America First policies.

But however they want to message it, we’re still left to deal with the fallout.

It’s vital that we send a clear and strong message that our borders will be SECURED.

Please chip in what you can right now to show everyone that you want to regain control of our Southern border! (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-041421?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Border_041421&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=1ac2c17df7&mc_eid=UNIQID)
SECURE OUR BORDERS - CHIP IN NOW >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-041421?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Border_041421&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=1ac2c17df7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

Our country is a land of opportunity, where people can come in search of the thriving American Dream. But there still needs to be law and order, and we aren’t a nation if we don’t have borders.

Joe Biden refuses to enforce our laws and is fueling this crisis. It’s critical to elect Republican leaders who will secure our borders, and get this situation under control, and we need your help (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-041421?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Border_041421&utm_agency=alpha&mc_cid=1ac2c17df7&mc_eid=UNIQID) .

– Team IN GOP
$5 – Become a border Defender >> (https://secure.winred.com/indiana-republican-party/e-border-041421?utm_source=HouseFile&utm_campaign=ingop&utm_medium=Email&utm_content=PG_INGOP_E_Border_041421&utm_agency=alpha&amount=5&mc_cid=1ac2c17df7&mc_eid=UNIQID)

name: Mark Warner
subject: "The largest rollback of consumer mail services in a generation"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | Derek,

It's Mark Warner. I wanted to make sure you saw the email my team sent around about the Postal Service. I'm hearing from too many Virginians about the damage that's been done by the failure of leadership at USPS. That's why I'm asking you to add your name to this petition today. I'm working every day to fix this mess, but we're still short of the 10,000 signature goal we've set.

Please add your name and join me in the effort to fix our Postal Service. | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27676362/280838311/-1614654045?code=MW&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-uspsja%3Frefcode%3Dris_20210414_e_p_us_na_na_uspsjakicker%26amount%3D10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ4YjZjYi02YzlkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad8laD5T9Nt0U6UaqjkGjaegOKH3kZ9MS3nt1ldolzQ=&emci=ea880efe-359d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e148b6cb-6c9d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

From: **Team Mark Warner**
Subject: This is not what our Postal Service should be
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27676365/280838314/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ4YjZjYi02YzlkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad8laD5T9Nt0U6UaqjkGjaegOKH3kZ9MS3nt1ldolzQ=&emci=ea880efe-359d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e148b6cb-6c9d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)
---
> Derek,
>
> Trump Postmaster General Louis DeJoy has done it again. The 10-year plan he just released for the U.S. Postal Service would decimate the institution so many Americans rely on. It would lengthen mail delivery times, reduce post office hours, and increase postage prices; _The Washington Post_ called it **"the largest rollback of consumer mail services in a generation."**
>
> **_Mark won't have it._** For months, he's been hearing horror stories from Virginians about delays in receiving life-saving medications and urgent bills. He's called on DeJoy to resign. He knows that we need to support the USPS and our postal workers – not undermine them.
>
> **So Mark has gotten together with a number of Democratic colleagues to urge Congress to restore the USPS. But to get traction, we need to show _overwhelming_ grassroots support for the Postal Service. [Will you add your name to urge congressional action to support the USPS?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27676368/280838317/-1614654045?code=MW&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-uspsja%3Frefcode%3Dris_20210414_e_p_us_na_na_uspsjakicker%26amount%3D10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ4YjZjYi02YzlkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad8laD5T9Nt0U6UaqjkGjaegOKH3kZ9MS3nt1ldolzQ=&emci=ea880efe-359d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e148b6cb-6c9d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)**
> **Goal: 10,000 signatures
> Your signature recorded?
> NOT YET**
> [SIGN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/27676371/280838320/-1614654045?code=MW&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fwarner-uspsja%3Frefcode%3Dris_20210414_e_p_us_na_na_uspsjakicker%26amount%3D10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMTQ4YjZjYi02YzlkLWViMTEtODVhYS0wMDUwZjIzN2FiZWYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad8laD5T9Nt0U6UaqjkGjaegOKH3kZ9MS3nt1ldolzQ=&emci=ea880efe-359d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&emdi=e148b6cb-6c9d-eb11-85aa-0050f237abef&ceid=4568237)

Peter,
This has been a challenging start to the year.

The mainstream media tried to silence me, cancel me, and knock me out of the fight.

**They tried to use corporate America’s economic stranglehold to starve me of financial support. **

They proclaimed me dead in the water; that the long list of corporations rescinding financial support would be my downfall.

** I knew they were wrong, and YOU proved them wrong.**

I am proud to have raised over THREE MILLION DOLLARS in this fundraising quarter. With your generous support, we sent a loud message to the Washington establishment, the mainstream media, big-tech, and woke corporations.

I have an army of grassroots supporters willing to support me for standing up for the average American worker.

So once again, thank you. Together we will continue to fight for conservatism, unafraid and unashamed.

God bless,
Josh Hawley

P.S. If you want to join our team and be part of this movement, sign-up and donate to our campaign. Every dollar helps us fight the big-tech, big-corporation, elitist establishment who are hell-bent on keeping the status quo.

name: House DFL Team
subject: Daunte Wright should be alive
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/EyAhbsCPKE4qn6LfGiR7szQ8u5sEHc9eLBtHRfo3OpU=/rUuU7Ca2FVkvk6VF4NlX1hCk1MTFW5o1tMYgOzxxxx8=?refcode=041421)
| | Friend, Daunte Wright, like George Floyd and so many others, should still be alive today. Our thoughts are with the family and loved ones of Daunte Wright and all who are grieving. No matter where we were born, how we pray, or what we look like, every Minnesotan wants to make it home at the end of the day. **Here 's the reality: House DFLers have held 11 hearings this year on police reform and accountability. Senate Republicans? They haven't held a single one.** Republican Senate Majority Leader Paul Gazelka said yesterday that the Senate will start to hold informational hearings, but we need to make sure that they're serious about meaningful reform. | | Patriot, **A brand-new smear campaign has been launched against me, but I am fighting back to expose the truth. **
The far-left New York Times has been publishing salacious allegations against me in an attempt to end my career fighting for the forgotten men and women of this country.

But the truth is, the mainstream media is publishing lies to try to take me down while covering up real scandals like Hunter Biden’s deals in Ukraine and Governor Cuomo’s assault against seniors in nursing homes. **It is a shame that the Left tries to drag my dating life into their political attacks, but it’s no surprise - when your ideas suck, you have to stoop this low. **

| [**While the Left cheers and spreads these lies, I am going to need our support to fight back.**](http://links.theredmajority.com/u/click?_t=f78dc796b7604f07af5651bb6a6292ab&_m=319764a1c1344a8f8c97152d12fd3686&_e=thLEgDbkaYRhf0LMB7CLSLUqb1pLgFkDjJuripV2LqxcR8s0a3Woz73VmakSdz1o5r463jb41xsukWzm3t4BfrCB5WcC6-2MSZ_ArbW_yMSaMUxe3y_76h7ip8ABBuea6QluAAKojR1L9OaVWClGfwM1pBSkQsPbQeTdSuHTFNPyBs6RXiO8blEfshqc9shJGq__wfCALUTSdc65ll9OGyDj-9CxncMzlS2szqbqAYQ-tvlJvMUq8ayepuZlmf-kfXEumq9Cjnl-pWGnCXaUY0atRC9EM2FDW1Sjr8tzQXAcqabo4fEbqkHnUk7-pcWiaKJTu-qafcgpXavuKbehLTQ0I2cXVvR21wFF6RiQZw8%3D)

_**These lies against me come as no surprise after I decided to take on the most powerful institutions in the Beltway: the establishment; the FBI; the Biden Justice Department; the Cheney political dynasty; even the Justice Department under Trump.**_

name: Kevin Faulconer
subject: Your right to privacy is being threatened
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022
body:
California liberals want to intimidate voters into silence. Read more >>
****Newsom’s allies look to INTIMIDATE RECALL petition signers**** **Let’s show they CAN’T![Rush support >>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/b17beb2b36c11178c3d6b838967d376c/34943)**
Peter, If you like your right to privacy in California, then it’s time to pay attention to the Democrats’ latest attempt to thwart it. There is a new bill circulating in the California legislature that would allow politicians facing recalls to see the names of the people who signed petitions to oust them! This is a voter intimidation tactic, pure and simple. This bill would give the names and contact information of California citizens who sign recall petitions to political operatives so they can intimidate them into withdrawing their signatures for 45 days. **Californians have a right to privacy, and a right to be left alone!** The recall process is a Constitutional right for Californians, and politicians should not be allowed to use threats and intimidation against citizens who exercise those rights just so they can continue to stay in office. The recall against Newsom is supported by Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. It has such widespread support that it's scaring Sacramento politicians into trying to change the rules. No wonder they’re trying to take the power away from the people. It is critically important that Californians stand up now and show Newsom and his leftist buddies that we will NOT be intimidated into silence. **We need you now more than ever, Peter. Let's show Newsom & his pals that we will not be silenced!** [**RUSH A $5 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/a987ac1869db8132c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**RUSH A $25 DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/ab166d09a14f38f3c3d6b838967d376c/34943) [**RUSH ANOTHER DONATION >>**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/71a8cb8a95a9cd83c3d6b838967d376c/34943) We can’t allow this reckless bill to interfere with our recall process in California. **[Please help me stop it by sending your grassroots donation today](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/ca95f36ea54c206cc3d6b838967d376c/34943)**. Every dollar helps in the fight to protect Californians and our right to privacy. Thanks for your help,
Kevin Faulconer | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/51dd2c2cc83ff84fc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/0b61187b767eb95bc3d6b838967d376c/34943) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/b8d0d2556ccf170a3a89ac0c84d83476/34943/6ddd439ac275a747/5cb3ee4be808d32ec3d6b838967d376c/34943)

clean_body: California liberals want to intimidate voters into silence. Read more >> **Newsom’s allies look to INTIMIDATE RECALL petition signers Let’s show they CAN’T Peter, If you like your right to privacy in California, then it’s time to pay attention to the Democrats’ latest attempt to thwart it. There is a new bill circulating in the California legislature that would allow politicians facing recalls to see the names of the people who signed petitions to oust them! This is a voter intimidation tactic, pure and simple. This bill would give the names and contact information of California citizens who sign recall petitions to political operatives so they can intimidate them into withdrawing their signatures for 45 days. Californians have a right to privacy, and a right to be left alone! The recall process is a Constitutional right for Californians, and politicians should not be allowed to use threats and intimidation against citizens who exercise those rights just so they can continue to stay in office. The recall against Newsom is supported by Democrats, Republicans, and Independents. It has such widespread support that it's scaring Sacramento politicians into trying to change the rules. No wonder they’re trying to take the power away from the people. It is critically important that Californians stand up now and show Newsom and his leftist buddies that we will NOT be intimidated into silence. We need you now more than ever, Peter. Let's show Newsom & his pals that we will not be silenced! We can’t allow this reckless bill to interfere with our recall process in California. **. Every dollar helps in the fight to protect Californians and our right to privacy. Thanks for your help, Kevin Faulconer | | | | ---|---|--- id:2021-04-09-13:40:13:687t Paid for by Faulconer for Governor 2022

name: Jim Jordan
subject: Will you take a moment to cast your vote this evening?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. Will you take a moment to cast yours now?

|
---

Peter,

Recently my team and I sent you an email asking for you to help us better understand the direction which the Republican Party is headed. More pointedly, **[we asked you to weigh in on whether or not you consider President Trump the leader of the Republican Party.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57843686:WmNQwYd4N:m:1:2247059263:AEC1C6457F90A01F97EC3D2A3B4C5052:r)**

My team just delivered a preliminary report to me and we're not seeing the results we were hoping for. **We set a goal of finding 50,000 conservatives to vote in our poll - the more votes the more accurate the findings - and we're coming up 1,000 votes short. **

Peter, your name is not on my list as having voted. **[Would you do me a personal favor and cast your vote in my poll before midnight tonight?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57843686:WmNQwYd4N:m:1:2247059263:AEC1C6457F90A01F97EC3D2A3B4C5052:r)**

[ ](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57843686:WmNQwYd4N:m:1:2247059263:AEC1C6457F90A01F97EC3D2A3B4C5052:r)
You see, the earlier we can determine the direction in which Republican voters want the party to go - and the leaders who voters want to be at the helm -- _**the sooner we can fine-tune our plans to help take back the House majority in next year's midterm elections**_.

We are asking for your vote one last time ahead of our midnight deadline tonight. **[Will you take a moment to cast yours now?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57843686:WmNQwYd4N:m:1:2247059263:AEC1C6457F90A01F97EC3D2A3B4C5052:r)**

We need to know whether or not you're going to stand with our Party leadership - **including President Trump** - as we work to take back the house from socialist-sympathizing Democrats next year.

| [**Take My Trump Poll Today ➔**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57843686:WmNQwYd4N:m:1:2247059263:AEC1C6457F90A01F97EC3D2A3B4C5052:r)
---

For freedom,
[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/57843686:WmNQwYd4N:m:1:2247059263:AEC1C6457F90A01F97EC3D2A3B4C5052:r)
Jim Jordan

name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Here’s what AOC is up to this week →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Conservatives love to attack AOC and call her “ineffective.” The truth is, Alexandria is fighting every single day to get real, substantial relief to working families.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210414-2007-header&t=1&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6)
We’re about to ask you to **[make a contribution to help Alexandria continue getting stuff done for working families in NY-14 and beyond.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8524?refcode=em20210414-2007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6)**
But before we do, we wanted to give you an update on what Alexandria’s been up to (just this week alone) and how your support makes this critical work possible:
* The Funeral Assistance program that AOC fought for and won for families affected by COVID-19 launched this week. **After hearing from her community about how many families were being financially impacted while grieving for their loved ones, she got to work.** On Monday, she joined Senator Schumer for a press conference to break down how to apply to receive up to $9,000 in federal assistance.

* **After hearing about another devastating fire in Jackson Heights, Queens, AOC helped raise over $15,000 for displaced families in just 24 hours.** She visited with the impacted families on Monday and shared that the city would be extending family hotel stays until April 20 to give families more time to figure out their next steps.

* **Now, Alexandria is working with Senator Gillibrand to introduce a bill to expand banking services at U.S. Post Offices in underbanked communities.** Postal banking could help reach the 6 percent of adults who currently do not have access to a bank account, while generating $8.9 billion in new annual revenue.

Conservatives love to attack AOC and call her “ineffective.” The truth is, Alexandria is fighting every single day to get real, substantial relief to working families in our district and across the country.
[We are working to make sure Alexandria is able to stay focused on fighting for working families, and not on political games. But on our grassroots-powered campaign, we can’t do this work without your support. Can you chip in $3 now so that we can continue this vital work and keep our campaign staff on the ground where they’re needed?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8524?refcode=em20210414-2007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/8524?refcode=em20210414-2007&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6)**
Thank you,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210414-2007-footer&t=5&refcode2=2007_2526796_L0sGu6&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=6&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=7&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=8&akid=2007%2E2526796%2EL0sGu6)

To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Judicial Watch Corruption Chronicles
subject: Dozens of Gitmo Captives Confirmed to Reengage in Terrorism after Release are At Large
body:
Dozens of captives verified by the U.S. to reengage in terrorist activity after being released from the military prison in Guantanamo Bay are at large, a recently declassified intelligence report reveals.

---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | April 14, 2021
---|---|---
| | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53429&L=22613&F=H&)
---
# [Dozens of Gitmo Captives Confirmed to Reengage in Terrorism after Release are At Large](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53429&L=22613&F=H&)
Dozens of captives verified by the U.S. to reengage in terrorist activity after being released from the military prison in Guantanamo Bay are at large, a recently declassified intelligence report reveals. Recidivism among detainees freed from the compound at the U.S. Naval base in southeast Cuba—also known as Gitmo or GTMO—is nothing new and has been well documented for years by the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). In its latest disturbing update, ODNI discloses that the whereabouts of 69 former Gitmo detainees that the government is certain returned to terrorism is unknown.
[Read More](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53429&L=22613&F=H&)
|
---
| |
---

Starting with Hunter Biden’s laptop, “the Justice Department refuses to do anything significant against Joe Biden despite the evidence that he’s directly implicated in his son’s racketeering.” Fitton argued that “by refusing to do anything significant relating to Hunter Biden investigation, the Justice Department, per usual, practically speaking took sides in the election fight.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53429&L=22614&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZGVlcC1kaXZlL3RoZS1odW50ZXItYmlkZW4tc2NhbmRhbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Y29ycnVwdGlvbitjaHJvbmljbGVzJnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTA0MTQyMTU2MTM=)

### [Appeals Court Hearing: Pelosi/Schiff Argue Congress Can Secretly Subpoena Phone Records of Citizens ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=53429&L=22607&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvY29uZ3Jlc3Mtc3VicG9lbmEtcGhvbmUtcmVjb3Jkcy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1jb3JydXB0aW9uK2Nocm9uaWNsZXMmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIxMDQxNDIxNTYxMw==) Judicial Watch Judicial Watch released a transcript of the March 24 oral argument before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit challenging a lower court ruling upholding the secrecy of controversial secretly-issued congressional subpoenas for phone records by Rep. Adam Schiff, Chairman of the U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, relating to the impeachment of President Trump. The appeals court hearing came after a lower court ruling in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit, Judicial Watch v. v Adam Schiff and U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (No. 1:19-03790)), requesting subpoenas issued by the Committee on or about September 30, 2019. clean_body: Dozens of captives verified by the U.S. to reengage in terrorist activity after being released from the military prison in Guantanamo Bay are at large, a recently declassified intelligence report reveals. | | | Because no one is above the law! | April 14, 2021 ---|---|--- | | Dozens of captives verified by the U.S. to reengage in terrorist activity after being released from the military prison in Guantanamo Bay are at large, a recently declassified intelligence report reveals. Recidivism among detainees freed from the compound at the U.S. Naval base in southeast Cuba—also known as Gitmo or GTMO—is nothing new and has been well documented for years by the Office of the Director of National Intelligence (ODNI). In its latest disturbing update, ODNI discloses that the whereabouts of 69 former Gitmo detainees that the government is certain returned to terrorism is unknown. | | | = Judicial Watch Judicial Watch is working hard to get more information on the Biden Family scandals, undertaking “the basic investigations” that Congress and the Justice Department are seemingly unwilling to do, Fitton noted Friday. Starting with Hunter Biden’s laptop, “the Justice Department refuses to do anything significant against Joe Biden despite the evidence that he’s directly implicated in his son’s racketeering.” Fitton argued that “by refusing to do anything significant relating to Hunter Biden investigation, the Justice Department, per usual, practically speaking took sides in the election fight.” = == Judicial Watch Judicial Watch released a transcript of the March 24 oral argument before the U.S. Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit challenging a lower court ruling upholding the secrecy of controversial secretly-issued congressional subpoenas for phone records by Rep. Adam Schiff, Chairman of the U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence, relating to the impeachment of President Trump. The appeals court hearing came after a lower court ruling in the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit, Judicial Watch v. v Adam Schiff and U.S. House Permanent Select Committee on Intelligence (No. 1:19-03790)), requesting subpoenas issued by the Committee on or about September 30, 2019. == == Judicial Watch JW President Tom Fitton: “It’s pretty clear [John] Brennan was one of the key guys pushing this fraudulent dossier. I don’t trust anything those agencies have said about the Russiagate scandal.” == = = = = | CLIPS == | | | | | | Keep our investigators on the job uncovering the truth: | = | | | | ---|---|--- = = = Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800, Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 (C)2017-2021, All Rights Reserved = |
